# Tejal APC C1 — Chapter 1 (mini-fixture)

Mini-fixture representing primary content for the trial-475 regression test.
This file is the natural primary source for the lesson; the directive-composer's
default walker should pick it up as `role: supporting` (alphabetically-second
in the mini-corpus where appendix.md sorts first).

The operator-edit path of the regression test simulates re-pinning this file
to `role: primary`.
